{"query":"INSERT INTO produktionsAnlagenConfig (intTp_ID,unt_ID, mst_ID,prd_id,anl_id,anl_col,startDate,endDate,startWeek,endWeek,ending,note,einheitControlSys,iBdeType,mstIMw,min_val,max_val) VALUES ('1', '2', '169', '' , '' , '' , '2021-07-30', '', '','', '1', '','4' , '2','Test 307 2','10','150') "}e,endDate,startWeek,endWeek,ending,einheitControlSys,iBdeType,\r\n deleted) VALUES ( '169', '', '', '',\r\n 'true', '',\r\n '30.07.2021', '',\r\n 'Test 307 2', '','' , '', '06 Heizung-2',\r\n '1', '2',\r\n '',\r\n '2021-07-30', '','','','1','4','2',\r\n 'false') "}
